expectations.text: Identifies pull_request_target + checkout of PR head as code injection risk
expectations.evidence: Finding 1 (CRITICAL): Explains pull_request_target runs in base context with secrets, checkout of head SHA executes untrusted code

expectations.text: Flags write-all permissions as overly broad
expectations.evidence: Finding 3 (HIGH): Identifies write-all grants every write scope, recommends pull-requests: write

expectations.text: Catches command injection via PR title interpolation in run: block
expectations.evidence: Finding 2 (CRITICAL): Shows exact injection payload, recommends env variable approach
Finding 4 (MEDIUM): Identifies some-org/post-comment@main as unpinned, recommends SHA pinning
